calendar.matters:
Petition To Approve Settlement Agreement Between All Heirs To Decedent Shigeo Kubota
Off Calendar May-03-2021 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-07-2021 Continued To Jun-07-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dennis Zell, via ZOOM, counsel for Alison Kubota, Beneficiary; Catherine Koss, via ZOOM, counsel for Shigeyuki Kubota, Petitioner.

At the outset, the court advises that it has reviewed the Settlement Agreement and that it is comfortable in possibly granting it. The court then requests confirmation in open court regarding whether there are any objections to the court approving the Petition to Approve Settlement Agreement. No objections are made.

The Petition to Approve Settlement Agreement Between All Heirs to Decedent Shigeo Kubota and Petition for Probate of Will and For Letters Testamentary are taken under submission. If the Petition to Approve Settlement is granted, the court shall determine how to proceed with the Petition for Probate of Will and For Letters Testamentary.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition To Approve Settlement Agreement Between All Heirs To Decedent Shigeo Kubota
Off Calendar Mar-17-2021 Continued To May-03-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-17-2021 Continued To May-03-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Approve Settlement Agreement Between All Heirs To Decedent Shigeo Kubota
Off Calendar Feb-17-2021 Continued To Mar-17-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-17-2021 Continued To Mar-17-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-07-2020 Continued To Feb-17-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-26-2020 Continued To Dec-07-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Dennis Zell appeared by zoom for Alison Kubota (Petitioner).
Catherine Koss appeared by zoom for Shigeuki Kubota (Objector).

Mr. Zell requested a continuance stating that the Parties settled and that they will be filing a petition for approval of the settlement. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to December 7, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Examiner: Helen Trowbridge. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-24-2020 Continued To Oct-26-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Zell, Esq., counsel for Alison Kubota, Petitioner (appearing by video conferencing); Catherine Koss, Esq., counsel for Shigeyuki Kubota, Objector (appearing by video conferencing).

Mr. Zell reports that the parties have reached a settlement through mediation, essentially folding the subject property into an existing trust and effecting the settlement through the trust. The Court sets hearing on the status of the settlement for October 26, 2020 and instructs Mr. Zell to file a petition for approval of the settlement one week before that date. After further discussion, Ms. Koss advises the Court that upon completion of the settlement agreement, it is her client's intention to dismiss the existing will contest.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-25-2020 Continued To Aug-24-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-02-2020 Continued To Jun-01-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Catherine Koss for heir/objector Shigeyuki Kubota. Shigeyuki Kubota on Court Call.
Dennis Zell for Petitioner, Alison Kubota, via Court Call.

Ms. Koss stated parties had met and confer, requested 90 days continuance for discovery and proposed June 1, 2020 for continuance. The Court noted anything for the court to be considered is to be filed by May 20, 2020 with courtesy copies delivered by May 26, 2020.

The petition for probate of will and for letters testamentary is continued to June 1, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: S. Le. Deputy: K. Tauscher. Matter not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-26-2020 Continued To Mar-02-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-15-2020 Continued To Feb-26-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Steven Siner appeared by telephone for Petitioner.
Trisha Friedeberg for the Kubota sons.
Shigeyuki Kubota appeared by telephone.

The Court noted that at the last hearing the matter was continued for Ms. Friedeberg to file her objections no later than January 7, 2020 and that no objections have been filed. Ms. Friedeberg stated that she needs to withdraw as Counsel due to a conflict for reasons that she cannot state, that a substitution of attorney has been signed by Shigeyuki, but she has not heard from Haruki and that she believes Shigeyuki intends to get new Counsel and file objections. Mr. Siner spoke of concern and frustration in delay of the matter and stated that he opposes any continuance. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to February 26, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Mr. Kubota that he needs to get new Counsel on board and that he and Haruki need to get their objections on file by February 19, 2020 whether or not they have obtained Counsel.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: J. Lelu. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-18-2019 Continued To Jan-15-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Steven Siner appeared by telephone for Petitioner.
Trisha Friedeberg for Shigeyuki Kubota and Haruyuki Kubota (Beneficiaries).

The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to January 15, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Friedeberg to file her objections no later than January 7, 2020.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
